emails.subject: Meter 9682
emails.body: Daren do you want to bump that volume up per the information in this note below. George wanted to know and asked me. It was previously nomed at 200. Let me know what you think and I'll make the change if needed. Forwarded by Tom Acton/Corp/Enron on 02/17/2000 08:14 AM George Grant@ECT 02/16/2000 03:46 PM
